issue.title: [InstCombine] Failure to recognise CTTZ pattern using CTLZ
issue.body:
While we correctly fold this hackers delight ctpop pattern into ctz:
```ll
define i4 @src_ctpop(i4 %a0) {
  %dec = add i4 %a0, -1
  %not = xor i4 %a0, -1
  %and = and i4 %dec, %not
  %clz = tail call i4 @llvm.ctpop.i4(i4 %and)
  ret i4 %clz
}
define i4 @tgt_ctpop(i4 %a0) {
  %ctz = tail call i4 @llvm.cttz.i4(i4 %a0, i1 false)
  ret i4 %ctz
}
```
we fail to recognise the related clz pattern:
```ll
define i4 @src_lz(i4 %a0) {
  %dec = add i4 %a0, -1
  %not = xor i4 %a0, -1
  %and = and i4 %dec, %not
  %clz = tail call i4 @llvm.ctlz.i4(i4 %and, i1 false) ; undef = true is ok as well
  %ctz = sub i4 4, %clz
  ret i4 %ctz
}
define i4 @tgt_lz(i4 %a0) {
  %ctz = tail call i4 @llvm.cttz.i4(i4 %a0, i1 false)
  ret i4 %ctz
}
```

Alive2: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/AdPVa5
issue.author: RKSimon

comments.author: RKSimon
comments.body:
Some playing with this suggests the last sub often disappears before the clz pattern could be matched so this might be a better fold:
```ll
define i4 @src_lz(i4 %a0) {
  %dec = add i4 %a0, -1
  %not = xor i4 %a0, -1
  %and = and i4 %dec, %not
  %clz = tail call i4 @llvm.ctlz.i4(i4 %and, i1 false) ; undef = true is ok as well
  ret i4 %clz
}
define i4 @tgt_lz(i4 %a0) {
  %ctz = tail call i4 @llvm.cttz.i4(i4 %a0, i1 false)
  %res = sub i4 4, %ctz
  ret i4 %res
}
```

comments.author: MihailMihov
